ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-27-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-14-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGMENT DEBTOR KASSANDRA NOLAN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MS. NOLAN'S WAGE GARNISHMENT IS REDUCED TO $300.00 PER MONTH, TO BE TAKEN IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 EVERY TWO WEEKS. 50% OF FUNDS CURRENTLY HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL BE RETURNED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR, AND 50% SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. COURT SHALL PREPARE AND SEND OUT A FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES AND SHERIFF'S OFFICE. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/JKS)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN, KASSANDRA ,AN INDIVIDUAL

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SHAYAN HEIDARZADEH, ESQ. of Persolve, LLC, Tel No. 818-534-3108 appearing telephonically for the Judgment Creditor;
Judgment Debtor KASSANDRA NOLAN, Tel No. 415-912-8874 appearing in pro per.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued by parties and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Judgment Debtor Kassandra Nolan's Claim of Exemption is granted in part and denied in part. Ms. Nolan's wage garnishment is reduced to $300.00 per month, to be taken in the amount of $150.00 every two weeks. 50% of funds currently held by the levying officer shall be returned to the judgment debtor, and 50% shall be released to the judgment creditor. Court shall prepare and send out a formal order to parties and Sheriff's Office. Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/JKS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Off Calendar
